title: ANIMA Stage 2 declared vacuous under Amendment 1

content.decision: ANIMA Stage 2 (Self-Generated Adaptation Signal) declared vacuously passed under Amendment 1.

amendment1_criteria.criterion_1_multiple_approaches: Three approaches tested: (1) gradient-based w_lr adaptation — signal too weak (~1e-8/step), (2) reactive phase-dependent w_lr — 5 configurations at 10 seeds, best d=+0.031, (3) I-state variance theoretically ruled out (non-monotonic mapping, c005 analog). All with adequate statistical power (10 seeds, multi-K).
amendment1_criteria.criterion_2_mechanism_works: w_lr modulates non-degenerately. Reactive rule produces 3.5× w_lr variation (0.00028 to 0.00100). The parameter moves, the adaptation is real, the distributions are non-trivial.
amendment1_criteria.criterion_3_no_performance_difference: Best adaptive config (base=0.0003, scale=3) achieves d=+0.031, p=0.863 vs best fixed w_lr=0.0003. Functionally identical.
amendment1_criteria.criterion_4_theoretical_explanation: Per-step signals cannot capture sequence-level w_lr optimality. The MI gap depends on how well the FINAL state distinguishes FULL sequences (K × 60 + settling + final = ~1000 steps). No per-step signal can detect whether the current w_lr is optimal for this sequence-level property. The signal encodes phase presence (signal vs settling), not W-I quality balance. This is the ANIMA analog of c036.

comparison_to_living_seed_stage3.living_seed: Stage 3 vacuous because eta landscape is FLAT — parameter non-binding, nothing to optimize.
comparison_to_living_seed_stage3.anima: Stage 2 vacuous because w_lr landscape has INVERTED-U (interior optimum at 0.0003) but no Principle-II-compliant signal can detect position on the curve. The problem is timescale mismatch, not landscape shape.
comparison_to_living_seed_stage3.implication: ANIMA's Stage 2 vacuousness is more informative than Living Seed's Stage 3 — it identifies a specific architectural limitation (per-step vs sequence-level timescale gap) rather than just parameter insensitivity.

content.frozen_frame_status: w_lr becomes 'adaptive (vacuous)'. Calibrated from 0.01 to 0.0003 (3.5× MI gap improvement). The frozen frame shrinks by one element. Tau remains frozen (non-binding). Gamma remains frozen (boundary-optimal, calibration-only).
signals_rejected_without_test: I-state variance (non-monotonic w_lr mapping, c005 analog)

constraints_implied: c048: ANIMA Stage 2 vacuous. No Principle-II-compliant per-step signal can detect optimal w_lr. The W-I tension creates an inverted-U at the sequence level, but the information about position on that curve does not exist at the per-step timescale.
